title: The Krieg Pirates Bring War to the Baratie
description: On pages 12–15, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Damn it! What did we ever do to you! Why the hell do you have to follow us all the way out here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He deflected it. It'll be the same no matter how many times you shoot.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He changes the bullet's trajectory with the tip of his sword.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've never seen such graceful movements.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A sword without grace is no strong sword.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Did you cut this ship as well with that sword?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I set sail to meet you!

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
